rag_no_rag_summary: The customer would not be covered for the cracked screen. It was confident and right
rag_grounded_summary: The cracked screen is not covered. The phone was purchased 18 months ago, so the 12-month Standard Limited Warranty has expired. It was more precise and specific with its answer
stretch_notes:
